name: Fried Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Select young okra, wash it well, dry thoroughly, and cut crosswise into pieces about one-half inch thick.
2. Heat the fat in a heavy skillet.
3. Add the okra to the skillet, cover, and cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
4. Remove the cover and continue cooking until the okra is tender and lightly brown.
5. Serve immediately once cooked.
